databaseConnectionString.value: [format('postgresql+asyncpg://{0}:{1}@{2}:5432/{3}?ssl=require', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('{0}-database', parameters('resourcePrefix'))), '2025-04-01').outputs.adminLogin.value, parameters('postgresAdminPassword'), reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('{0}-database', parameters('resourcePrefix'))), '2025-04-01').outputs.serverFqdn.value, reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('{0}-database', parameters('resourcePrefix'))), '2025-04-01').outputs.databaseName.value)]

redisConnectionString.value: [format('rediss://:{0}@{1}:{2}/0', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('{0}-cache', parameters('resourcePrefix'))), '2025-04-01').outputs.redisPrimaryKey.value, reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('{0}-cache', parameters('resourcePrefix'))), '2025-04-01').outputs.redisHostName.value, reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('{0}-cache', parameters('resourcePrefix'))), '2025-04-01').outputs.redisPort.value)]
